summary: Created MPI-109: empty-media I2V Cue (Q) dispatched anyway; no media injected -> ComfyUI fell back to baked default filenames on both LoadImage nodes (841 Start_Frame, 839 End_Frame). Files exist locally (authoring residue) so local 'works'; clean Pod volume rejects -> prompt_outputs_failed_validation 503 -> bug dialog. Not empty-prompt, not lingering image. Fix = guard at dispatch + warning toast.

Picked up — adding required-media guard at top of startGeneration (generationService.js): required slot with no matching media -> ui:warning toast + abort (return null). Single chokepoint covers Q/Cue/loop.

MPI-109 COMPLETE + accepted. Fix (generationService.js, app-only no rebuild): guard imports getCommandMediaInputs; required slot (role-exact OR mediaType fallback, item must have url) unsatisfied -> emit ui:warning 'Add an image before generating - this workflow needs one.' + onError + return null. Cue dispatcher advances cleanly via onError->finishCueDispatch. USER live-verified on remote Pod (Wan 2.2 I2V Smooth): empty PromptBox + Q -> toast, no bug dialog, no dispatch. Logic self-check passed (6 cases).
Archived from done to tasks/_archived/MPI-109 (mpi-archive cleanup of oldest completed cards).
